title: Property Consultant - NCC Urban - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - NCC Urban - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
NCC Urban has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NCC Urban:
NCC Urban is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NCC Urban!
